heading: Sanctions exception relating to importation of goods
label: 10261 Sanctions exception relating to importation of goods

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The authorities and requirements to impose sanctions under this chapter shall not include the authority or requirement to impose sanctions on the importation of goods.

children.heading: Good defined
children.label: b Good defined
children.text: In this section, the term “good” means any article, natural or man-made substance, material, supply, or manufactured product, including inspection and test equipment, and excluding technical data.
